title: Birthday Card for Nan – “Happy Birthday to a Wonderful Nan” | Elegant Floral Garland Design with Wildflowers | Thoughtful Card from Granddaughter, Grandson or Family | Blank Inside
features: 💐 A BEAUTIFUL CARD FOR A SPECIAL NAN – Features the message “Happy Birthday to a Wonderful Nan” surrounded by a delicate floral garland of pastel wildflowers – timeless, elegant, and full of love.
description: Celebrate her special day with a card as lovely and thoughtful as she is. This EverKind “Happy Birthday to a Wonderful Nan” card features a beautifully illustrated floral garland of wildflowers in soft pastel tones. Daisies, lavender, and gentle pink blossoms form a circular arrangement around the hand-lettered word “Nan”, creating an elegant, timeless design filled with love and appreciation. Perfect for birthdays from a granddaughter, grandson, or family member, this sentimental card captures the warmth and joy of celebrating someone truly special. Whether gifted alone or paired with a thoughtful present, it’s a beautiful way to remind her how loved she is. Each card is printed in the UK on premium 350 gsm FSC-certified cardstock and measures 148 × 148 mm. It includes a pink peel-and-seal envelope and is packaged in compostable wrap with a 500 gsm board backing for secure delivery. The inside is blank, ready for your own heartfelt words. A timeless keepsake designed to make her smile – from EverKind.
